M

MACHINE - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot.Shooter
The machine player fired this shot.
MACHINE_NICKNAME - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Display name used for the computer-controlled opponent.
MACHINE_WON - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.GameState
The machine player sank the entire human fleet.
machinePlayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
machinePlayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.FleetPlacementThread
 
machinePlayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
 
MachinePlayer - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Represents the computer-controlled opponent.
MachinePlayer(String, IMachineShotStrategy) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.MachinePlayer
Creates the machine player with the given nickname and targeting strategy.
MachineTurnThread - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
Executes the machine player's turn on a dedicated background thread so the JavaFX Application Thread is never blocked during the artificial "thinking" delay.
MachineTurnThread(GameSession, MachineTurnThread.MachineActionCallback) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread
Creates a new machine-turn thread.
MachineTurnThread.MachineActionCallback - Interface in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency
Callback invoked on the JavaFX Application Thread once the machine has fired its shot and the model has been updated.
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.Main
System execution vector executing programmatic process instructions.
Main - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Main application entry point for the runtime framework compilation layer.
Main() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.Main
 
mainStage - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.SceneManager
 
markerOverlays - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Maps a fired-upon coordinate to its marker ImageView, so it can be removed later.
MarkerShapeFactory - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes
Builds the small overlay shapes drawn on top of a single cell to represent a shot's outcome: a miss (thick rounded white X) or a hit (solid red circle).
MarkerShapeFactory() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.MarkerShapeFactory
 
markShipSunk(Shot) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
markTrayEntryUsed(Node) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_SHIP - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
Maximum placement attempts per individual ship before giving up.
MenuController - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Controller for menu-view.fxml, the application's true entry screen (see AppInitializer).
MenuController() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.MenuController
 
MISS - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.CellState
A shot was fired at this cell and it contained no ship.
MISS_ARM_LENGTH - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
 
MISS_STROKE_WIDTH - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
